intro: Rei (meaning my shepherd or my friend) was one of David's loyal supporters who did not side with Adonijah when Adonijah attempted to seize the throne before David's death (1 Kings 1:8). He is listed alongside Benaiah, the mighty men, Zadok, and Nathan as those who supported the succession of Solomon. Nothing further is recorded about him; his exact role or status at the court is not defined. The brief mention preserves his name in the narrative of David's final political crisis.
hitchcock_meaning: my shepherd; my companion; my friend
